indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no privacy or acoustic enclosure
indicators.rationale: The open office layout with large windows and lack of walls or partitions makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: bright artificial lighting
indicators.rationale: Bright artificial lighting is incompatible with sleep and can disrupt circadian rhythms.

reasoning_summary: This is a large, open office space with no bed or resting surface, no privacy or acoustic enclosure, and bright artificial lighting. The lack of any sleep-supportive features makes this space unsuitable for sleep.
